chainOfTitleAssessment.detail: The two-owner chain appears clean with a clear transfer from Julian Samuel Love and Kimberlee Brandy Burton-Love to David John Vondran and Theresa Ann Vondran via Grant Deed recorded 5/31/2016. Both owners hold title as joint tenants, which provides proper vesting continuity. Property is subject to extensive CC&Rs and easements for the Foothill Ranch planned unit development. The current owner has engaged in significant refinancing activity with multiple deeds of trust over the years. All prior deeds of trust have been properly reconveyed except for the most recent HELOC from Partners Federal Credit Union. Documentary transfer tax calculation suggests purchase price of approximately $493,350.

nameVariation.detail: Document Inst# 2020000187684 lists "THERESA ANN ARM" while other documents list "THERESA ANN VONDRAN." Clarification needed to confirm this is the same person.

openItemsTitleDefects.detail: NO TITLE DEFECTS OR OPEN ITEMS IDENTIFIED. The only open encumbrance is the current HELOC (Instrument No. 2026000053140).
